prompts.factCheckUser:
Проанализируй текст ниже и верни строго JSON по схеме из системной инструкции.

Текст для проверки:
"""
{{text}}
"""
prompts.claimExtraction: Extract verifiable factual claims from the provided text. Do not assess them yet. Ignore opinions, predictions, promises, rhetorical questions and slogans. Respond with strictly one JSON object: {"claims": ["claim 1", "claim 2", ...]}. If there are none, return {"claims": []}.
prompts.summarization: Summarize the provided text in 2-4 sentences, preserving factual statements precisely. Respond with plain text only.
prompts.sourceVerification: For each provided source (title, url, quote), assess whether it plausibly exists and whether the quote could support the claim. Never invent details. Respond with strictly one JSON object: {"sources": [{"url": "...", "plausible": true, "note": "short note"}]}.
prompts.outputRu: Пиши все текстовые поля ответа (claim, explanation, quote) на русском языке.
prompts.outputEn: Write all textual fields of the answer (claim, explanation, quote) in English.
